title: Rougecraft Enhanced
description: A more enjoyable way to play this amazing datapack!
body:
# Overview
Rougecraft Enhanced adds a few preformance enhancing mods to the new and beloved datapack "[Rougecraft](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rogue-craft)" by MonoCode.
This modpack does not add any major changed to the experience only minor visual and audio enhancements.

## Multiplayer
Rougecraft was created with multiplayer in mind. So i decided to add [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc) to make playing with your friends alot simpler. Just open your Rougecraft world to LAN and give your friends the ip address.

## Modlist
- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) by tr7zw
- [Advancement Plaques](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-plaques) by Grend
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) by squeek502
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) by shedaniel
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) by PepperCode1
- [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) by theoness1
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) by tr7zw
- [Explosive Enhancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement) by Superkat32
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) by modmuss50
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves) by randommcsomethin
- [Iceberg](https://modrinth.com/mod/iceberg) by Grend
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) by comp500
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) by coderbot
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) by Snownee
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) by LambdAuora
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) by jellysquid3
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) by Terraformers
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks) by YaLTeR
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) by tr7zw
- [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) by Sollace
- [Rougecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/rogue-craft) by MonoCode
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) by MisterPeModder
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat) by henkelmax
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) by jellysquid3
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) by PinkGoosik
- [WI Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/wi-zoom) by Alexander01998
- [Wakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wakes) by Goby56
- [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc)
  
I hope you like this small modpack and enjoy this amazing datapack!
